storyHook: 预约剪发，沟通长度，剪完付款
storyBlurb: 周六上午，甲走进小区理发店，想为下周的重要场合剪个利落发型。乙师傅耐心沟通长度，剪刀翻飞间，甲看着镜中的自己渐渐满意。
storyScript:
【开场·进店预约】周六上午的阳光斜斜地照进小区门口的理发店，甲推门而入，店里弥漫着洗发水的清香。乙师傅正在给一位客人吹风，抬头招呼一声，甲点点头，在等候椅上坐下。几分钟后，乙师傅送走客人，甲起身走向洗头椅，乙师傅调好水温，温水淋在发丝上，指尖轻轻揉搓，泡沫泛起，甲闭上眼，享受这片刻的放松。

【进行·沟通发型】甲坐回剪发椅，面前是一面大镜子，乙师傅站在身后，问想剪多长。甲用手比划着，说下周要参加一个重要场合，想剪得利落些，长度到耳下三指就好，后面修薄一点，不要碎发。乙师傅仔细听着，用梳子挑起一缕头发，示意长度，甲点头确认。剪刀咔嚓咔嚓地响起，碎发纷纷落下，乙师傅手法娴熟，时而用梳子梳理，时而用剪刀修剪，甲看着镜中的自己，头发一点点变得整齐清爽。

【收束·剪完付款】甲站起身，乙师傅用海绵扫去颈间的碎发，甲走到收银台前，掏出手机扫码付款。乙师傅笑着说，下次再来。甲推门走出理发店，阳光正好，微风拂过，新发型清爽利落，甲心情愉悦，想着下周的场合一定自信满满。

narrative.when: 周六上午，提前打了电话预约
narrative.how: 坐在椅子上，对着镜子沟通
narrative.method: 说明想要的长度和样式、洗剪吹、照镜子确认、付款
narrative.event: 甲下周要参加一个重要场合，想剪个利落的发型

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good morning! You are the ten o'clock?
turns.zh: 早上好！您是十点预约的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is me. I called yesterday.
turns.zh: 是的，我昨天打电话约的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Come in. Sit here for now. I will get the water ready.
turns.zh: 请进，先坐这边，我去调水温。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The water is warm. That is good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Tell me if it is too hot.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is fine. Just right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your hair is thick. Takes a little longer to get clean.
turns.zh: 您头发厚，洗干净要多一点时间。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. No rush.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will use the tree plant kind. Good for the head skin.
turns.zh: 我用茶树系列，对头皮好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It smells very clean.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now lean back. Like this.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is quite nice.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Come sit in the big chair.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My hair is all over the place.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is fine. We start from the beginning and work up.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I need something clean. I have an important meeting next week.
turns.zh: 我需要一个干净利落的发型，下周有个重要会议。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A meeting? So clean and full of feeling.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. But not too short on top.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep the top full. You have a good head for it.
turns.zh: 头顶我会保留厚度，您头型好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And the sides?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Short, clean, off the ears. Lines sharp.
turns.zh: 短而干净，不盖耳朵，线条利落。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is exactly it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Keep still. Starting from the back.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How much are you taking off?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: About this much.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A little more than that, please.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. To here. Good?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Perfect.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your hair has a good feel. Easy to work with.
turns.zh: 您的头发质地很好，好操作。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I did not be safe of it much before.
turns.zh: 我以前不怎么护理头发。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I can see that. But it is in good order now.
turns.zh: 看得出，不过现在状态很好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A friend told me to use a better kind of soap for the hair.
turns.zh: 一个朋友告诉我要用好一点的洗发水。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And you listened. Wise.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It took three years for that friend to win me over.
turns.zh: 那个朋友花了三年才说服我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Some people take longer.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How does the back look?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Like this.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Clean. I like it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now the sides. Turn your head to the right.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it uneven?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One side is always a little longer. I will fix it.
turns.zh: 有一边总是会长一点，我来修。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The left side grows faster. Always has.
turns.zh: 左边长得快，一直都是这样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You notice these things about yourself.
turns.zh: 您注意到自己的这些细节。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have had this hair all my life.
turns.zh: 我这头发跟了我一辈子了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Fair point. Left side, coming up.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not too much.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Just making it the same as the right.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Turn back. Face front.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How is it looking?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Very good. Clean round the ears.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The front — could you take a bit off?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How much?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Just enough that it does not fall in my eyes.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Tip your head down a little.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Like this?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Keep still.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One cut.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I can feel it falling.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: There. Now you can see.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh — that is much better.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The face shows now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I did not know that made such a difference.
turns.zh: 我不知道这样差别这么大。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The front hair sets the whole look.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now the top — a little?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will only take off the dead ends. Keep the full feeling.
turns.zh: 我只修发尾，保留蓬松感。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your hair grows fast. Come back in five weeks.
turns.zh: 您头发长得快，五周后就要来了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is sooner than I thought.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good hair needs regular care.
turns.zh: 好的发型需要定期打理。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I usually leave it three months.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Three months is why you came in looking like you did.
turns.zh: 三个月就是您进来时那个状态的原因。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is fair.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Five weeks this time. Before the next big event.
turns.zh: 这次五周后来，下一个重要场合之前。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will try. May I book now?
turns.zh: 我争取，现在可以预约吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Same day in five weeks, ten o'clock, I have a good time.
turns.zh: 可以，五周后同一天十点还有空。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Book it. I will do my best to keep it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now the neck. Let me clean the line.
turns.zh: 好，接下来修脖颈的线条。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The small machine makes me jump.
turns.zh: 那个小电动工具让我心跳加速。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is very light. You will not feel it.
turns.zh: 很轻的，您不会有感觉的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I still jumped.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Everyone does the first time.
turns.zh: 每个人第一次都会这样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This is not my first time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I know. But with this small thing, everyone jumps.
turns.zh: 我知道，但遇到这个小工具，每个人都会。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Even you?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: When I was learning, yes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now I feel better.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All done. Have a look.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I look like I have my life in order.
turns.zh: 我看起来像是把生活过得井井有条的人。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A good cut will do that.
turns.zh: 好的发型就有这种效果。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am not joking — this is the best it has looked in years.
turns.zh: 我是认真的，这是好几年来最好看的一次。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You have good material to work with.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me pay. How much?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Forty.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is very fair for this much work.
turns.zh: 这么多工夫，四十块很公道。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Come back in five weeks and I will give you a good price.
turns.zh: 五周后来，我给您算个好价钱。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am already booked.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Phone payment — I scan here?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. That machine.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. And — go show that hair off.
turns.zh: 谢谢。还有——去展示一下您的新发型吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. Thank you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good luck with the meeting.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. I feel ready now.
turns.zh: 谢谢，我现在感觉准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the point of a good cut.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I should have come sooner.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Next time, five weeks.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Five weeks. I give you my word.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: See you then. Have a good day.
